tasks.title: Implement proper Supabase auth foundation with email/password + magic link, shared session handling, and a /login route
tasks.notes: Requested by Trist in Slack on 2026-03-13. Preserve the public homepage. Build a clean auth foundation for the personal site without trampling the existing uncommitted Task Pulse changes in the repo.

tasks.title: Add protected private routes for the owner dashboard and existing sensitive admin surfaces
tasks.notes: Replace security-by-obscurity with real auth gating. Keep public routes public. Prefer minimal, composable route guards and clear unauthenticated redirects.

tasks.title: Harden Supabase authorization and RLS for artworks plus future private dashboard data
tasks.notes: Current repo has overly open access patterns. Introduce a real owner-only authorization model that is compatible with Supabase Auth and production deployment.

tasks.title: Ship the first private dashboard shell for active projects, open loops, and assistant-tracked work
tasks.notes: This is the first useful private area behind auth. Start simple: cards, sections, placeholders, and easy extension points for later OpenClaw/Slack/Linear integrations.

tasks.title: Document required Supabase project settings, migration/deploy steps, and local env setup for hosted auth
tasks.notes: Leave the repo in a state where the auth setup is repeatable and understandable, including any manual steps still required in Supabase dashboard settings.

tasks.title: Add tests or smoke checks for auth-critical flows and verify build/lint still pass
tasks.notes: Protect the basics: unauthenticated redirect, login UX, protected-route access, and build stability. Keep checks lightweight but real.
